user.title: Bombers de Catalunya
user.description: Set the location to monitor and the two tracking radii. You can drag the marker and resize the circle on the map; both default to your Home Assistant home location.

data_description.location: The map's circle sets the tracking radius: fires inside it are tracked (counters, geo_location entities). Default 100 km.
data_description.alert_radius: Fires inside this smaller radius trigger the "fire nearby" binary sensor and events. Must not be larger than the tracking radius.

error.alert_gt_track: The alert radius must not be larger than the tracking radius.
